prompt: Create a photorealistic candid nighttime street photo with a gritty flash-photography party snapshot aesthetic. The scene shows two adult women sitting close together on a city sidewalk curb outside nightlife venues, both wearing black mini party dresses and small chain-strap purses. Their faces are intentionally anonymized by flat opaque brown square blocks placed over each face. The woman on the left has long dark wavy hair, a deep V-neck black dress, tanned skin, one knee raised, and motion-blurred arms as if she is gesturing or dancing while seated. The woman on the right has shoulder-length blonde hair, a strapless black dress, crossed legs, a delicate necklace, and one hand holding a small dark object near her knee. Include 3 prominent human figures total: the 2 seated women in the foreground and 1 tall adult man in dark clothing walking or standing behind them on the sidewalk, partially cropped at the top. The environment is an urban nightlife street at night, with a concrete sidewalk, parked cars along the road, leafy trees, storefronts and bar entrances, purple neon lighting on the left, warm streetlights, and a visible sign on the left reading ENTRANCE ON 3RD STREET. Use a wide horizontal 16:9 composition, low eye-level perspective, dim ambient lighting, harsh on-camera flash, slight underexposure, realistic skin highlights, motion blur on moving hands, noisy high-ISO texture, and an unpolished smartphone snapshot look. Keep the background dark and slightly soft while the foreground subjects dominate the frame.
